title: Eventually Some Guns
description: A simple gun pack mod with a few extras. This is just the first version, updates will come soon-ish.
body:
**Made by me, for you.**

After downloading way too many crappy modpacks, I made my own. No over-the-top mods, no dumb extras, and you don’t need half your RAM just to open it. Just a clean gun pack with some handy QOL stuff.

I plan to update this for now with new & intresting mods that fit within the feel of the pack.

**Mod List:**

- Ambient Sounds
- Appleskin
- Farmers Delight
- Geophilic
- Immersive Aircraft
- Jade
- Just Enough Items
- Just Enough Guns
- Mouse Tweaks
- Marbleds Arsenal
- Mo' Than Enough Guns
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Supplementaries
- Underground Bunkers
- Wares
- Xeros Minimap & World Map
- YUNG's Better Mineshafts
- YUNG's Extras
- And a bunch of optimisers & QOL mods
